narrativeAtSnapshot: Solana mainnet beta launched March 2020. Claims 65,000 TPS with sub-second finality using Proof of History consensus. Serum DEX (FTX-backed) live on Solana since August 2020. Developer ecosystem forming rapidly — Rust-based programming attracting systems engineers. Weekly mention growth: ~3x in blockchain developer communities, Rust/systems programming forums. Still completely unknown to mainstream crypto retail (most retail investors focused on ETH DeFi). FTX providing significant ecosystem support. Structural signal: 3 elite developers with systems programming backgrounds, $20M+ venture backing, unique technical architecture addressing ETH scalability limits. Wormhole bridge development underway for cross-chain interoperability.
